ptsdEstimates.note: Estimated annual cases of birth-related PTSD (post-traumatic stress disorder) in England

birthTraumaClinics.note: Percentage of NHS maternity trusts with a dedicated birth trauma or birth reflections clinic

perinatalMhReferrals.note: Annual referrals to NHS perinatal mental health services in England

metadata.methodology: PTSD estimates derived from Birth Trauma Association prevalence surveys (3-4% of births) applied to ONS live birth counts. Birth trauma clinic provision from NHS England maternity transformation programme survey data. Perinatal MH referrals from NHS Mental Health Mission MHMDS quarterly returns.
knownIssues: PTSD prevalence estimates based on survey data; clinical diagnosis rates are likely lower due to underdiagnosis
Birth trauma clinic definition varies — some trusts count informal 'birth reflections' services
Referral growth partly reflects capacity expansion, not solely increased need
